title: Data Loading & Dataset Management
description: System loads, provides, and manages training datasets including fields and batch sampling
use_cases: Provide Batches with Weighted Dataset Sampling

key_classes.name: BaseDataset
concrete_methods: read(video_idx, frame_idxs, view_idxs, data_fields) -> dict[DataField, Any]
key_classes.notes: read() handles None frame/view index defaults; delegates to _read_data()

key_classes.name: Radym
key_classes.notes: LRU(10) zip handle cache per worker; multi-view via n_views param

key_classes.name: RadymWrapper
methods: get_data(idx, data_fields, frame_indices, view_indices, camera_convention='opencv') -> dict
key_classes.notes: get_data() iterates view_indices and concatenates tensors across views via _read_data()

key_classes.name: Provider
key_fields: data_fields [IMAGE_RGB, CAMERA_C2W_TRANSFORM, CAMERA_INTRINSICS, optionally METRIC_DEPTH, LATENT_RGB]
methods: _preprocess(file_name, rgbs, c2ws, intrinsics, depths, timesteps, latents, target_index, num_input_multi_views)
key_classes.notes: Reads dataset config from dataset_registry; loads latent stats if is_generated_cosmos_latent

key_classes.name: InfiniteCommonDataset
key_classes.notes: __getitem__ calls dataset._read_data() for RGB/pose/intrinsics/depth; loads T5 embeddings from .pkl; supports DP sharding via megatron parallel_state

key_classes.name: DepthWarpDataset
key_classes.notes: Merges DATAVERSE_CONFIG with kwargs; factory for InfiniteCommonDataset

key_classes.name: IterativeGEN3CDataLoader
key_classes.notes: Weighted ratio-based random sampling across multiple named dataloaders; yields batches with 'dataset_name' key

key_classes.name: ImageTransform
methods: preprocess_images(images, depths) -> (video, depths, shift, scale, flip_flag)
key_classes.notes: CenterCrop + Resize; optional max_crop mode; optional flip

key_relationships: RadymWrapper extends Radym (adds multi-view, static/dynamic modes)
Provider wraps RadymWrapper (or any registry dataset) as torch.Dataset
InfiniteCommonDataset wraps Radym (instantiated via config target string)
DataField enum used as keys in all _read_data() output dicts
data_flow: Developer/Config → DATAVERSE_CONFIG or dataset_registry → dataset class + params
→ dataset._read_data(video_idx, frame_idxs, view_idxs, data_fields) → dict[DataField, Tensor]
→ Radym reads: MP4 via VideoReader, depth/flow EXR from ZIP, pose/intrinsics from .npz, masks PNG from ZIP, caption .txt
→ T5 embeddings loaded from .pkl keyed by frame chunk
→ IterativeGEN3CDataLoader ratio-samples across multiple datasets → yield batch to TrainingSystem
use_case_actor_assignments: TrainingSystem → Configure Dataset, Load Video Files, Load Depth Data, Load Camera Poses, Sample Frame Indices, Apply Image Transforms, Provide Batches, Get Data for Video Index
DataLoader → Iterate Multiple Datasets (Ratio-Based), Provide Batches with Weighted Dataset Sampling
Developer → Register Dataset in Registry, Configure Dataset, Enumerate Available Data Fields
important_notes: Two parallel codebases: Lyra-1 (Provider/RadymWrapper pattern) and Lyra-2 (InfiniteCommonDataset/DepthWarpDataset pattern)
DataField is shared across both codebases as str+Enum for typed dictionary keys
LRU cache (size 10) for ZIP file handles per worker prevents descriptor leaks
Megatron parallel_state used for DP sharding of dataset index ranges in Lyra-2
Both Radym implementations support optional video mirroring to handle short clips
InfiniteCommonDataset uses multiplier = 2M * batch_size / n_data_per_node for infinite-style length
